title: Run a migration end-to-end and audit results
userStory: As an operator, I want to migrate a chosen Notion target and verify dedup + cost so that the brain ingestion path is provably working before declaring data done.
acceptanceCriteria: Run migrate ... --target <id> --dry-run first; eyeball the planned-episode log
Live run completed; episode count matches Notion item count for that target
Spot-check entity dedup: the same entity referenced in 3+ episodes collapses to one node in Graphiti
Spot-check fact timestamps: valid_from on extracted facts matches the source item's created_time
Total Anthropic spend recorded for this run; surface the actual figure in the commit message or audit note
